finding: KnowledgeBase.get resolver reads ctx.params.id; endpoint is GET /api/knowledge-bases/{id} (param name 'id') — correctly keyed. list/listDocuments/retrievalInfo/usage shapes match KnowledgeBase/KnowledgeBaseDocument/RetrievalInfo/KnowledgeBaseUsage; IndexingSummary has all 6 required fields.

ScheduledTask.listRuns resolver reads ctx.params.id; endpoint is GET /api/scheduled-tasks/{id}/runs (param 'id') — correctly keyed. RunsPage/ScheduledTaskRun/ScheduledTask/SchedulerAdminSettings shapes match; all required fields present.
File.get resolver reads ctx.params.file_id; endpoint is GET /api/files/{file_id} (param 'file_id') — correctly keyed (matches the prompt's cited hazard). mkFile() produces all required File fields.

All 5 voice cassettes (getSettings/listModels/listVersions/listModelCatalog/getInstance) are param-less GETs and their shapes match VoiceSettings/VoiceModel/RuntimeVersionListResponse2/VoiceCatalogResponse/VoiceInstanceInfo including required fields. /settings/voice's secondary GETs (listModelDownloads/listVersionDownloads/getInstanceLogs/getModelStatus) are unseeded but fall through to makeSafeEmpty -> render empty (no-active-download is a valid state), not a crash.

CodeSandbox.listRootfsVersions cassette matches VersionStatus (availability:'ready' is a valid SandboxAvailability; available[] items match RootfsRelease required fields; all required VersionStatus fields present).

Notification.list matches NotificationPage {items,page,per_page,total,unread}; unreadCount matches UnreadCount {unread}; each Notification carries all required fields. js-tool JsToolSettings + auth SessionSettings + app SetupStatusResponse shapes also verified.

Aggregator flips preserve the exact prior export surface: overlays.tsx (OverlayEntry/OVERLAY_ENTRIES/WIRED_OVERLAY_SURFACES/overlayBySlug), deepStates.tsx (DeepStateEntry/DEEP_STATE_ENTRIES/deepStateBySlug/DEEP_STATE_SLUGS/DeepStateFrame), seededSurfaces.tsx (SeededSurfaceEntry/SEEDED_SURFACE_ENTRIES/seededSurfaceBySlug/SEEDED_SURFACE_SLUGS/SeededSurfaceFrame). Deep-state entry count preserved exactly (17=17).

GALLERY_CASSETTE spread order preserved: {...crawlCassette, ...MODULE_CASSETTE} keeps crawl base first, per-module hand-authored entries winning per key. All 5 previously-central cassettes (chat/citations/llmProviders/projectDeep/workflow/auth) re-homed in their module gallery.tsx; adminUser/adminMe/adminPermissions/showcaseConversationIds re-exports retained (seed.ts consumers unaffected).

Redundant/duplicated cassette key: auth/gallery.tsx spreads ...authCassette (which already seeds 'Auth.getSessionSettings': sessionSettings, added in a prior fix with the explanatory comment in fixtures/auth.ts) AND re-declares 'Auth.getSessionSettings' inline immediately after. The inline literal (updated_at 2026-01-01) silently shadows the authCassette value (updated_at 2026-07-05). Harmless (both type-valid, same TTLs) but dead/duplicate; the inline block + comment can be dropped.

'App.getSetupStatus':{needs_setup:true} is placed into the SINGLE global GALLERY_CASSETTE. The app module's initialize() runs during seedGallery()->loadModules()->initializeModules() and calls checkSetupStatus(), so Stores.App.needsSetup flips to true for the WHOLE gallery session (previously it resolved to undefined via makeSafeEmpty). Currently benign: the SetupRedirect routerEffect is never mounted (pages.tsx renders each surface in an isolated MemoryRouter without the app root's routerEffects slot). Latent coupling — if any future gallery surface mounts the app root / routerEffects, every page would redirect to /setup. Consider scoping the needs-setup seed to the SetupPage surface rather than the global cassette.

Overlay open/setup closures reference live stores/actions: Stores.SchedulerDrawer.openCreate, Stores.VoiceUploadModelDrawer.openUploadModelDrawer, Stores.FilePreviewDrawer.openPreview all exist; code-sandbox stores (SandboxResourceLimits/SandboxRootfsVersions) and auth stores (AuthProviders/Auth/App/AppMode) all exist. holdPatch/whenTrue used (not holdForever) — no forever-hold leak in the moved surfaces.

All new module gallery.tsx mirror the reference modules/user/gallery.tsx shape (export const gallery: ModuleGallery) and import ONLY from @/dev/gallery/support plus the shared fixtures DATA layer (@/dev/gallery/fixtures/{auth,project-deep}) — never a central aggregator file (overlays/deepStates/seededSurfaces). Consistent with the reference which also imports @/dev/gallery/fixtures/*.

No cross-module cassette-key collisions (mergeModuleCassettes would throw at boot; only intra-module Auth.getSessionSettings dup exists which is object-literal shadowing, not a merge collision) and no duplicate slugs across all module galleries (assertUniqueSlugs clean). Old central seeded/shard2-5.tsx files are deleted (1662 deletions), so surfaces are moved not double-registered.
